title: Stardewful Plaques
description: Stardew Valley theme for Advancement Plaques.
body:
# 🖍️ About
This **resource pack** replaces the default look of **[Advancement Plaques](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-plaques)** Mod with **Stardew Valley** themed plaques!
![GIF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8165afa7420a9aa6c6cb3a3550b7e19f0891bb46.gif)

# To keep in mind

- This Resource Pack won't do anything on its own, it requires **[Advancement Plaques](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-plaques)**.
- Feel free to use this pack in your modpack!
- Please **do not redistribute** this pack
  

# Support
If you like this resourcepack you can support me with a coffe on **[Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/cerealconjugo)!** **<3**
